v4Periphery._notes: Wave M1 hooks (deployed 2026-05-21) + v4 swap router. FxSwapHook permissionFlagsLow14Bits 0xAC8 (beforeAddLiquidity | beforeRemoveLiquidity | beforeSwap | afterSwap | beforeSwapReturnDelta). TelaranaGatewayHubHook 0x88 (beforeSwap | beforeSwapReturnDelta). V4SwapRouter re-pinned by Wave N4 to FxV4RouterHarness (deployed 2026-05-22 tx 0xedf26e79…17c4) — PMM-aware, settles user input BEFORE manager.swap, which is required by FxSwapHook's beforeSwap (it takes input from PoolManager inside the hook at FxSwapHook.sol L731). Replaces the Wave N2a PoolSwapTest pin (0x60004B…11fa, kept on-chain under V4SwapRouter_deprecated below) which settled AFTER manager.swap — verified incompatible by N3's reverted swap artefact 0xde83acb7…62f6. Source manifests: fx-telarana@feat/wave-m1-deploy-arc-hooks + feat/wk1n4-deploy-fxv4routerharness-arc.
v4Periphery.V4SwapRouter_deprecatedNote: PoolSwapTest from lib/v4-core/src/test/. Settles input AFTER manager.swap → breaks FxSwapHook PMM beforeSwap. Kept on-chain for v4-LP-shape pools without PMM custom-accounting hooks.

deprecated.reason: V1 hub+hook+spoke shipped 2026-05-15 with no relay surface (only HUB could call hook). Stage 6 (this session) adds relayToRemoteHub + relayMintFromRemote + owner + relayCallers; required hub redeploy → hook redeploy (HUB immutable) → spoke re-migration.

marketIdsNote: M3 + M4 added 2026-05-18 via contracts/script/DeployArcAudfMarkets.s.sol. Both verified via MorphoBlue.idToMarketParams. M3/M4 use FxOracleAudf (fresh, USDC+AUDF, AUD/USD not inverted); M1/M2 keep using the original FxOracle (USDC+EURC, owned by FxTimelock, not retrofittable).
marketLltvsNote: Immutable per-market LLTV (Morpho MarketParams.lltv) in WAD (1e18). Sourced from contracts/script/Deploy*.s.sol — keep in sync when a new market lands. Web UI reads this as the fallback when the live FxMarketRegistry read is unavailable; the live read always wins when present.

gateway.rotationPlan: Owner: rotate to TimelockController / multisig. Authority on hook: rotate to FxHubMessageReceiver via EIP-1271 once Circle ships 1271 support (~mid-July 2026).
gateway.relayCallersNote: Empty until BUFX (perp/spot layer in sibling repo) lands. Whitelist via hub.setRelayCaller(bufxAddress, true).

stage6E2E.destinationCaller: 0x2931C50745334d6DFf9eC4E3106fE05b49717DF1 (Arc hook v2 — locks mint to hook only)

notes: Arc Testnet has TWO roles: (1) a spoke (FxSpoke 0x13c8... routes USDC deposits via CCTP V2 to the Fuji primary hub, captured in the `hub` block) and (2) a trading-execution hub stack (deployed 2026-05-15 — FxHubMessageReceiver + Morpho + V4 adapters + FxGatewayHook with Stage 6 relay surface). Arc's hub is NEVER a user-deposit destination; it receives USDC liquidity from Fuji via FxGatewayHook (Circle Gateway, hub-callable only) for FX/perp execution. USDC is native 18-dec gas; the 0x3600...0000 address is the 6-dec ERC-20 form CCTP V2 + Gateway use. EURC is the real Circle-deployed token on Arc. Stage 6 relayMintFromRemote verified live 2026-05-15.

fuji.purpose: Borrow / lend / supply liquidity on the Fuji-side Morpho markets. Money-market substrate.

arc.purpose: High-frequency FX trading + perp execution on Arc. Also runs Morpho markets (borrow/lend works here too).
